MASTER_PAD_VERSION_INFO.MASTER_PAD_INFO: Portable Application Description file for software directory submission.

Program_Info.Program_Change_Info: Initial public PAD draft for SmartTAR STAR. Update version, release notes and direct download URL before submission.

English.Char_Desc_80: Experimental Windows PowerShell GUI archiver using transparent STAR containers.
English.Char_Desc_250: SmartTAR STAR is an experimental Windows PowerShell GUI archiver using tar.exe, transparent .star archive containers, block manifests, SHA-256 verification and recovery-friendly archive design.
English.Char_Desc_450: SmartTAR STAR is an experimental Windows PowerShell GUI archiver focused on practical archive creation, verification and recovery-friendly workflows. It uses Windows tar.exe, transparent .star archive containers, block manifest metadata, SHA-256 verification and smart compression planning with Hybrid, Smart, Solid and Smart XZ modes.
English.Char_Desc_2000: SmartTAR STAR is an experimental Windows PowerShell GUI archiver from the eco-by-different project. It is designed for users who want transparent archive containers, practical verification and recovery-friendly compression workflows on Windows. The project uses Windows tar.exe and focuses on .star archive containers, block manifest metadata, SHA-256 verification and smart compression planning. Supported planning modes include Hybrid, Smart, Solid and Smart XZ. The project is part of a broader collection of Windows utilities focused on system performance, efficient encoding, compression workflows and system-level tuning.

Permissions.Distribution_Permissions: Distribution is permitted provided that the original package is not modified and the official project URL is preserved.
Permissions.EULA: See the license file in the GitHub repository.
